---
applyTo: "scripts/**,output/**,README.md"
---

# How to Invoke StolenAi Workflows

Loaded when working with scripts, output, or session planning. Guides users on HOW to trigger each workflow.

## Plan Feature — "I want to break down a Feature"

| Step | What to do | Where |
|------|-----------|-------|
| 1. Fetch | Run in terminal: `.\scripts\plan-feature\fetch-feature.ps1 -FeatureId <ID> -Org "wtw-bda-outsourcing-product" -Project "BenefitConnect"` | Terminal |
| 2. Refine | In Copilot chat, say: "refine this feature" and paste the JSON output | Chat (skill: refine-feature) |
| 3. Slice | Automatic — orchestrator invokes slice agent after refinement completes | Sub-agent |
| 4. Review | Check `output/<ID>/stories-review.md` generated by dry-run | Editor |
| 5. Post | Run: `.\scripts\plan-feature\post-stories.ps1 -InputFile output/<ID>/stories.json -ParentId <ID> -Org "..." -Project "..." -DryRun` | Terminal |
| 6. Confirm | Remove `-DryRun` flag after reviewing to post for real | Terminal |

**Or use the orchestrator:** Say `@plan-feature process Feature <ID>` in chat — it coordinates all steps.

## Plan Story — "I picked up a Story, what's my plan?"

| Step | What to do | Where |
|------|-----------|-------|
| 1. Fetch | Run: `.\scripts\plan-story\fetch-story.ps1 -StoryId <ID> -Org "..." -Project "..."` | Terminal |
| 2. Refine | In Copilot chat, say: "refine this story" and paste the JSON output | Chat (skill: refine-story) |
| 3. Review plan | Approve/edit the task breakdown + dependency graph produced by refinement | Chat |
| 4. Persist | Run: `.\scripts\plan-story\persist-plan.ps1 -PlanFile output/<ID>/plan.json` | Terminal |
| 5. TDD | Say "run TDD for task 1" — drives red-green-refactor loop | Chat (skill: tdd) |
| 6. Micro-review | Automatic after each task — checks for spec drift | Sub-agent |

**Or use the orchestrator:** Say `@plan-story pick up Story <ID>` in chat.

## Quick Reference — "Where do I type this?"

| I want to... | Do this |
|--------------|---------|
| Break down a Feature into Stories | `@plan-feature` in chat, or run scripts manually |
| Plan implementation for a Story | `@plan-story` in chat, or `refine-story` skill manually |
| Just refine my Feature | Say "refine this feature" in chat |
| Just refine my Story | Say "refine this story" in chat |
| Check what scripts are available | `ls scripts/` in terminal |
| See previous outputs | Browse `output/<ID>/` folders |
| Review stories before posting | Open `output/<ID>/stories-review.md` |

## ADO Details (this workspace)

- Org: `wtw-bda-outsourcing-product`
- Project: `BenefitConnect`
